## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      10 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Apr 20, 2026 - Jul 16, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Broken app garbage_, Jul 16, 2026, 1/5: "Each update makes the app slower. Critical features get hidden behind AI features - like search. IOS widgets are super buggy. The share widget is completely broken. The app is unusable at some points."
            2. _Eipe with wings_, Jul 12, 2026, 1/5: "Not sure if it’s AI and rapid development but basic features glitch now"
            3. _AppleUserEU_, Apr 25, 2026, 2/5: "Why do I need to update this app twice a week? That many bugs? Sometimes I can’t access data on Notion when using the app, sometimes force closing the app and reopening it, does solve it. Otherwise I need to start using the website again."
